payload.title: Finance Committee Exhibit Book
payload.description: Finance Committee Exhibit Book for the January 24, 2022 MTA Finance Committee meeting, including BudgetWatch January 2022 Flash Report (2021 Year-End), Finance 2021 Year End Special Report, and DRAFT MTA 3rd Quarter Consolidated Financial Statements

evidence_refs.source_quote: Exhibit Book Finance Committee Meeting 1/24/2022
BUDGETWATCH January 2022 Flash Report Special 2021 Year-End Flash Report
Report to the Finance Committee 2021 Year End Review
Interim Financial Statements as of and for the Nine-Month Period Ended September 30, 2021

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA Headquarters (MTAHQ)
tool_args.raw_text: Metropolitan Transportation Authority Headquarters ("MTAHQ") provides support in budget, cash management, finance, legal, real estate, treasury, risk and insurance management, and other services to the related groups

payload.description: Provides support in budget, cash management, finance, legal, real estate, treasury, risk and insurance management, and other services to the related groups of the MTA

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metropolitan Transportation Authority Headquarters ("MTAHQ") provides support in budget, cash management, finance, legal, real estate, treasury, risk and insurance management, and other services to the related groups listed below.

tool_args.label: MTA New York City Transit (NYCT)
tool_args.raw_text: New York City Transit Authority ("MTA New York City Transit") and its subsidiary, Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority ("MaBSTOA"), provide subway and public bus service within the five boroughs of New York City.

payload.description: Provides subway and public bus service within the five boroughs of New York City operating through NYCT and its subsidiary MaBSTOA

evidence_refs.source_quote: New York City Transit Authority ("MTA New York City Transit") and its subsidiary, Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority ("MaBSTOA"), provide subway and public bus service within the five boroughs of New York City.

tool_args.label: MTA Long Island Rail Road (LIRR)
tool_args.raw_text: The Long Island Rail Road Company ("MTA Long Island Rail Road") provides passenger transportation between New York City ("NYC") and Long Island.

payload.description: Provides passenger transportation between New York City and Long Island

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Long Island Rail Road Company ("MTA Long Island Rail Road") provides passenger transportation between New York City ("NYC") and Long Island.

tool_args.label: MTA Metro-North Railroad (MNR)
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company ("MTA Metro-North Railroad") provides passenger transportation between NYC and the suburban communities in Westchester, Dutchess, Putnam, Orange, and Rockland counties in New York State and New Haven and Fairfield counties in Connecticut.

payload.description: Provides passenger transportation between NYC and the suburban communities in Westchester, Dutchess, Putnam, Orange, and Rockland counties in NYS and New Haven and Fairfield counties in Connecticut
